task_statement: CR.v4 P3 hard fan-in template locality repair, compact retry after 0629a design Agent adapter failed before returning. Use existing 3-axis evidence; do not add another design step. Repair only Brick QA template prose and minimal checker/profile wording if needed. Keep full Brick template required_return_shape; do not remove transition_concern_evidence from code-attack-qa or axis-attack-qa return.yaml. Clarify that QA/Inspector fan-in source transition_concern_evidence is non-binding local Agent evidence and is not Link-facing before closure-synthesis; carries_forward_fields remains the carry filter; closure-synthesis is the Link-facing concern source. No engine rewrite, no --large, no helper route, no manual required_return_shape/carry injection. QA may inspect/probe only and must not source-mutate. Closure reports FORWARD/HOLD/REROUTE/NOT_PROVEN as support evidence only.

nodes.work_statement: Implement the narrow template locality repair. Edit only if needed. Primary files: brick/templates/bricks/code-attack-qa/brick.md and brick/templates/bricks/axis-attack-qa/brick.md. Align prose with return.yaml: transition_concern_evidence remains in required_return_shape but is local/non-binding Agent evidence for fan-in source QA lanes; it is not Link-facing before closure-synthesis; carries_forward_fields filters it out; closure/closure-synthesis may be Link-facing under declared policy. If checker/profile wording is contradictory, update minimal text/assertions in support/checkers/lib/case_runners.py or support/checkers/profiles/building_skill_preset_agent_tool_hardening.yaml. Do not edit return.yaml, Link Movement, run/dynamic walker, or add routes. Run focused checks if possible.

Codex code/regression QA. Inspect the diff and focused checker evidence. Verify return.yaml fields were not removed; QA Brick prose says source-lane transition_concern_evidence is local/non-binding before closure; checker/profile wording matches full template return shape plus carry filtering/advisory adoption; run git diff --check and focused profile/checker where possible. Do not source-mutate.

Gemini-local axis/evidence QA. Attack Brick/Agent/Link boundaries. Check that Brick templates own return shape, Agent returns local/non-binding facts, and Link alone owns Movement/adoption. Verify support/checker wording does not make support or QA a Movement authority. Do not source-mutate; return exact not_proven if provider inspection is limited.

Codex closure. Fan in work, Codex QA, and Gemini axis QA. Report FORWARD/HOLD/REROUTE/NOT_PROVEN as support evidence only. HOLD if QA source-mutated, return.yaml fields were removed, checker/profile evidence is missing, or wording still implies QA source-lane concerns are Link-facing before closure-synthesis. Do not claim success, quality, source truth, or Movement authority.
